name: 21X AG
oneliner: First EU-licensed DLT Trading & Settlement System under the DLT Pilot Regime — the regulated secondary market that tokenised securities in Europe need to achieve real liquidity.
finserv: BaFin DLT Pilot Regime license granted Dec 2024; EU DLT TSS authorisation; integrated with Cashlink issuance and Tangany custody for end-to-end tokenised-securities coverage. Positioned alongside the Deutsche Börse ecosystem.
team: German fintech operator team with regulated markets DNA; Cashlink integration shows they understand they are infrastructure, not a destination venue. Funding amount undisclosed.
thesis: 21X is the regulated trading venue every EU tokenisation startup needs in order to have real secondary liquidity. If it scales, it becomes default rails for every MiCA-era tokenised security — the kind of infrastructure-layer asset BG is hunting for. Combined with Cashlink and Tangany it is the most complete tokenised-securities stack live in Europe today.
